_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Storage is primarily in AU regions with backups in a contracted Singapore facility under APP 8 with standard contractual safeguards
Access/correction requests (APP 12/13) may be submitted via our DSAR form (portal.southportmeridian.au/dsar) or by email to privacy@southportmeridian.au; we aim to respond within 30 days
we do not require Tax File Numbers and request they not be provided
draft, unlodged ASX Appendix 4D and Appendix 3B materials
must not brief analysts or investors on that content
in a trading blackout until lodgement and two full ASX trading days thereafter
where a customer supplies a TFN or driver licence in free text, we redact and securely delete it

uncertain.matched_text: Retention: HR records 7 years after employment ends; pre-employment health screening reports 2 years after decision; credit application data 5 years after account closure; de-identified analytics retained indefinitely
uncertain.reason: Retention markers are legally relevant under APPs but there is no explicit retention_marker rule in the allowed set.

uncertain.matched_text: We assess and notify under the Notifiable Data Breaches scheme and may contact the OAIC if required; our incident mailbox is security@southportmeridian.au
uncertain.reason: NDB notification practices are privacy-event markers but not covered by a specific allowed rule.
